parameters-en.Speed: Controls the rate of filter movement. Low values result in almost a flanger-type effect while higher values can generate spaceship noises, especially with a high Q.
parameters-en.Freq: Controls the range of the filters.
parameters-en.Q: Controls the resonance or width of the frequency band affected by the filters.
parameters-en.Gain: Controls the amount of boost or cut applied to the filtered frequencies.
parameters-en.Mix: Controls the balance between the filtered and dry signals. At 0%, no filtered signal is heard; at 100%, no dry signal is heard.
parameters-en.Level: Sets the overall level of the block.
